{{Item
| image = Rice mill.png
| id = rice_mill
| type = Block
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Rice Mill''' is a placeable block that allows player to automate the process of making Rice/Soy items.

==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipes
|-
|Any Fences
+ Any Logs

+ Cobblestone Slab

+ [[Paddy Rice|Rice Wheat]]
|[[File:Rice mill crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==

* <code>Right click</code> to place the block down.
* In order for the Mill to work, you need a 1x3 trench of Water (source or flowing) along with the wheel's direction. 
* Once the mill is setup correctly, animation will play and the bucket icon in the GUI will be filled with water.
[[File:Rice mill block.gif|thumb|You can also connect Furnaces and Hoppers to load and unload the Mill!]]With its wheel facing away from you:
* A Hopper can be placed on the left side of the mill to feed it input resources.
* A Hopper/Chest/Furnace/Smoker can then be placed on the right side and the mill will feed it its output resources in the appropriate slot if possible.

=== Rice Mill Recipes: ===
''(*note that the bowl is optional)''
{| class="wikitable"
|+
!Ingredients
!Bowl
!Result
|-
! colspan="3" |Rice
|-
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Rice Grains|icon=rice_grains}}
|Yes
|{{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice in a Bowl|icon=uncooked_rice_bowl}}
|-
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice|icon=uncooked_rice}}
|Yes
|{{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice in a Bowl|icon=uncooked_rice_bowl}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Paddy Rice|icon=rice_wheat}}
|Yes
|{{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice in a Bowl|icon=uncooked_rice_bowl}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Rice Grains|icon=rice_grains}}
|No
|{{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice|icon=uncooked_rice}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Paddy Rice|icon=rice_wheat}}
|No
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Uncooked Rice|icon=uncooked_rice}}
|-
! colspan="3" |Soy
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Soy Pods|icon=soy_pods}}
|No
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Soy Beans|icon=soy_beans}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Dried Soy Pods|icon=soy_pods_dried}}
|No
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Dried Soy Beans|icon=soy_beans_dried}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Edamame|icon=edamame}}
|No
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Unpodded Edamame|icon=edamame_unpodded}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Soy Pods|icon=soy_pods}}
|No
|{{Item with Sprite|Soy Pods|icon=soy_pods}}
|-
|3x {{Item with Sprite|Dried Soy Beans|icon=soy_beans_dried}}
|Yes
|{{Item with Sprite|Soy Milk|icon=soy_milk}}
|-
|{{Item with Sprite|Dried Soy Pods|icon=soy_pods_dried}}
|Yes
|{{Item with Sprite|Soy Milk|icon=soy_milk}}
|-
! colspan="3" |Others
|-
|Wheat
|No
|Bread
|}

==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.8.
*It was the first animated block entity of DTN.
